title: Marry
description: Marry & Hugs adds social interactions and relationship mechanics to your Minecraft server.
body:
![Marriage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffc34c2fffc9d2bf9bc23482dbc86dc576a0c322.png)

Let players propose, marry, and use simple couple tools: partner chat, visiting each other, a shared home, one chest, gifts, kisses, and hugs. Casual hugs and pokes stay for everyone else. --- ### 🚀 Features - Lightweight marriage flow: propose, accept, deny, divorce with confirm - Partner chat and /mc; tp and home ask you to hold still briefly (configurable) - Shared /marry sethome, couple chest (one opener at a time), gift item, pvpon/pvpoff, optional daily loot (Vault when present for money) - /hug, /cuddle, /poke, plus partner kiss and /marry cuddle - Priest ceremonies; admins: list couples, force marry/divorce, /marry reload, /marry priest - Update check via Modrinth (slug marry); bStats metrics --- ### 💬 Commands - **/marry player** → propose · /marry accept · /marry deny - **/marry info [player]** · /marry divorce (confirm in a second step) - **/marry chat** · /marry tp · /marry home · /marry sethome - **/marry gift** · /marry chest · /marry pvpon · /marry pvpoff · /marry daily - **/marry kiss** · /marry cuddle · /marry gender · /marry heart - **/marry ceremony** A B (priest) · /marry list [page] · /marry forcemarry A B · /marry forcedivorce player · /marry reload · /marry priest player - **/marry help [page]** shows only what you may use - **/hug** · /hug player · /hug top [page] · /cuddle [player] · /poke player --- ### 🔐 Permissions - **marry.use** — normal player tools (default true bundle in plugin.yml) - **marry.help** — help pages - **marry.priest** — ceremonies - **marry.admin**— list, force, reload, officiants (default op) Smaller nodes (tp, chest, hug, …) live under marry.use in plugin.yml; tweak in LuckPerms if needed. --- ### 📊 Metrics ![bStats chart](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Marry.svg) --- ### 🛠️ Compatibility - Minecraft Java 1.8 → 26.1.x · Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Folia · Java 8+ - Softdepend Vault (optional economy for daily rewards) --- ### 💙 Perfect for: Survival • SMP • Events • Streamer-friendly servers •roleplay • community hubs
